ELPAC Level 1
Lexile 650–1000L
DTR | Listen to a Speaker Support an Opinion
LSO-MS7-L1-6501000-MSMATH7-ARA-API-01 | MS Math: Grade 7 | Area and Circumference of Circles | Artifact Analysis | Asian & Pacific Islander Narratives
Round and True
Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between two students. The boy is discussing his opinion about a clay stamp his great grandmother made. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer four questions about the conversation and the evidence the boy gives to support his opinion. As you listen, you may take notes.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1:
Why does the boy bring up what his family says about his great grandmother?
2QUESTION 2:
How did the boy find out about the measurements of the stamp?
3QUESTION 3:
What did the boy find when he divided the distance around the stamp by the distance across it?
4QUESTION 4:
What does the boy conclude from his measurements?
Answer all 4 questions to submit.
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Listen for the moment the boy says what he thinks of his great grandmother. Listen for how he found the measurements. Listen for what he says about the number close to three.
CA ELD: PI.A.3, PI.B.5, PI.B.7, PI.B.8, PII.A.1 | CCSS: 7.G.B.4 | MS Math: Grade 7
